title: AI Digest #01 – Welcome to KANs!
text:
KANs replace fixed activation functions with learnable splines.





%%{init: {
  "theme": "base",
  "themeVariables": {
    "background":       "#222222",
    "primaryColor":       "#2d2d2d",
    "primaryBorderColor": "#00bc8c",
    "primaryTextColor":   "#ffffff",
    "secondaryColor":     "#2d2d2d",
    "tertiaryColor":      "#2d2d2d",
    "lineColor":          "#00bc8c",
    "edgeLabelBackground":"#222222",
    "clusterBkg":         "#2d2d2d",
    "clusterBorder":      "#00bc8c",
    "titleColor":       "#adb5bd",
    "fontFamily":       "Source Sans Pro, Lato, sans-serif",
    "fontSize":         "14px"
  }
}}%%
graph LR
    x1["x₁"] & x2["x₂"] & x3["x₃"] & x4["x₄"]

    x1 -->|"φ"| A1 & A2 & A3
    x2 -->|"φ"| A1 & A2 & A3
    x3 -->|"φ"| A1 & A2 & A3
    x4 -->|"φ"| A1 & A2 & A3

    A1 & A2 & A3 -->|"φ"| B1 & B2

    B1 & B2 -->|"φ"| OUT["f(x)"]

    A1["Σ φᵢ(xᵢ)"]
    A2["Σ φᵢ(xᵢ)"]
    A3["Σ φᵢ(xᵢ)"]
    B1["Σ φᵢ(xᵢ)"]
    B2["Σ φᵢ(xᵢ)"]

    subgraph IN["Inputs"]
        x1
        x2
        x3
        x4
    end

    subgraph L1["KAN layer 1"]
        A1
        A2
        A3
    end

    subgraph L2["KAN layer 2"]
        B1
        B2
    end

    subgraph OUT_G["Output"]
        OUT
    end






# Just for show – full repo is separate
class DDN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dim=8, hidden_layers=4, neurons = 128, output_dim=1):
        
        super().__init__()

        layers = []

        # Input layer:
        layers.append(nn.Linear(input_dim, neurons))
        layers.append(nn.SiLU())


        for _ in range(hidden_layers-1): # OBS input är "hidden", hence "-1"
            layers.append(nn.Linear(neurons, neurons))
            layers.append(nn.SiLU())
        

        self.network = nn.Sequential(*layers)

        # Output layer
        self.output_price = nn.Linear(neurons, output_dim)
        self.softplus = nn.Softplus() # Garanterar positiva priser

        self._init_weights()

    def forward(self, x):
        x1 = self.network(x)
        y = self.output_price(x1)
        return self.softplus(y) # > 0 !

# Just for show – full repo is separate
class DDN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dim=8, hidden_layers=4, neurons = 128, output_dim=1):
        
        super().__init__()

        layers = []

        # Input layer:
        layers.append(nn.Linear(input_dim, neurons))
        layers.append(nn.SiLU())


        for _ in range(hidden_layers-1): # OBS input är "hidden", hence "-1"
            layers.append(nn.Linear(neurons, neurons))
            layers.append(nn.SiLU())
        

        self.network = nn.Sequential(*layers)

        # Output layer
        self.output_price = nn.Linear(neurons, output_dim)
        self.softplus = nn.Softplus() # Garanterar positiva priser

        self._init_weights()

    def forward(self, x):
        x1 = self.network(x)
        y = self.output_price(x1)
        return self.softplus(y) # > 0 !
